sections.paragraph:
Original: תּוך תּך

Transliteration: tôk tôk

Phonetic: toke

BDB Definition:

  1. injury, oppression, oppressor
  2. (TWOT) fraud, deceit, deceitful

Origin: from the same base as H8432 (in the sense of cutting to pieces)

TWOT entry: 2509a

Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine
